name: XEN Real-Time Fabric
description: Architecture reference for the XEN real-time fabric: /btw promotion loop, race-safe injection state machine, cross-seat shared context, and the WSS/NATS/JetStream event spine.

vvsvei_btw_promotion_loop.purpose: Promote any inbound utterance/URL into the ONE live TUI session without spawning a duplicate session, pane, queue item, or context.
vvsvei_btw_promotion_loop.invariant: single-seat: never create a competing context

injection_state_machine.purpose: Race-safe copy -> paste -> enter injection into a live terminal seat.
injection_state_machine.race_guard: single-flight lock + settle delay before Enter; no overlapping injects

cross_seat_shared_context.purpose: One brain across all seats/timelines; every seat reads+writes the same context.
cross_seat_shared_context.backing: persistent shared context store (survives seat death / reborn)

event_spine.durable_log: NATS JetStream (append-only source of truth for execution events)
event_spine.read_models: browsers / agent-sessions / WSS clients are projections only
event_spine.cursor: WSS clients reconnect with a stored JetStream cursor; no content lost on restart

local_http_observation.purpose: Opt-in local observation of the live stream for the reborn brain.
local_http_observation.surface: loopback HTTP / SSE on the owning host only

canon.anti_regression: /btw injects into the current live session via the existing webhook — no new session/pane/queue-item/context.
canon.visual_system: XLRD TECH dark-mode hyperreality (see hitthe.link brand canon)
